lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (unrelated unused var)

notes: The existing code already had a Math.max-based Y calculation. The root bug was a race condition: rapid clicks read stale toolSections closure state before React re-renders, causing multiple sections to land at the same Y coordinate. Fix: added nextSectionYRef (useRef<number>(0)) updated immediately before the async createToolSection call. Each click takes Math.max(existingMaxBottom, nextSectionYRef.current) as the base, guaranteeing minimum 50px gap even under rapid clicking. Single-click behavior is unchanged; existing section positions are unaffected.
